title: ctenitis subconnexa var. subconnexa
intro: Ctenitis subconnexa var. subconnexa, also known as subconnexa tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis subconnexa var. subconnexa include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by drying and powdering its rhizome, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
